channel.title: Resumes on EchoSlate
channel.description: Recent content in Resumes on EchoSlate

item.title: ResumeCSE (2)
item.description:
Resume Overview

Below is the extracted content from the uploaded resume:

(704) 605-6481 patrickdxiong@gmail.com https://www.linkedin.com/in/patrick- xiong0825? CONTACT SUMMARY TECHNICAL SKILLS EDUCATION WORK EXPERIENCES Programming (Java) Infrastructure Networking System Administration Scripting Troubleshooting Security Awareness IT Support Bachelor’s of Arts in Biology University of North Carolina at Charlotte 2016-2021 Associates of Arts Catawba Valley Community College 2011-2015 Maintenance technician Mennel | Newton, NC Troubleshooted equipment breakdowns and performed preventive maintenance. Used problem-solving skills to alleviate issues efficiently with minimal supervision. Completed partial or full dismantling of equipment to quickly repair or replace defective components and restore functionality. Performed electrical and mechanical repairs of production equipment to minimize downtime July 2023-December 2023 Experienced and detail-oriented Technical Support Specialist with a proven track record of delivering exceptional technical assistance and problem-solving expertise. Proficient in diagnosing and resolving hardware, software, and network issues effectively and efficiently. Skilled in providing timely and courteous support to end- users, ensuring minimal downtime and maximum productivity. Strong communication and interpersonal abilities enable me to collaborate seamlessly with cross-functional teams and convey complex technical concepts in a clear and understandable manner. Committed to staying abreast of emerging technologies and continuously enhancing skills to deliver optimal support solutions. CERTIFICATIONS PATRICK D. XIONG TECHNICAL SUPPORT SPECIALIST Java Apprentice Wiley Edge | Hoboken, NJ | Remote Developed conversion and system implementation plans. Built databases and table structures for web applications. Inspected equipment, assessed functionality and optimized controls. Designed and implemented scalable applications for data extraction and analysis. Tested and deployed scalable and highly available software products. October 2022-January 2023 IT Technician OneSpotMD Primary and Urgent care | Charlotte, NC Managed system-wide operating system and software deployments as well as related software upgrade problems. Responded to support requests from end-users and patiently walked individuals through basic troubleshooting tasks. Performed troubleshooting and repaired peripheral devices such as printers, and scanners. September 2021-September2022 AGoogle Data Analytics AWS Cloud Practitioner DevOps Foundations Google Technical Support Fundamentals Java Level 4 - Full Stack Development Google Cloud Platform Fundamentals Java Level 4 - Full Stack Development Help Desk Analyst January 2024 - Present Provided technical support and troubleshooting assistance to end-users in resolving hardware and software issues. Managed and coordinated the laptop replacement project, including inventory management, procurement, and deployment of new laptops. Conducted training sessions for end-users on the use of new laptops and software applications to ensure smooth transition and optimal utilization. Collaborated with cross-functional teams to streamline processes, improve efficiency, and enhance user experience in the context of IT support and laptop replacement initiatives. CAT | Weisiger Group | Liftone - Charlotte, NC | Vendor SQL Bomgar SCCM Remote Desktop Data Transfer ManageEngine Hardware Shell-swap

item.title: Jane Doe
item.description:
Jane Doe

Email: jane.doe@example.com
Phone: (123) 456-7890
Location: San Francisco, CA, USA
LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/janedoe
GitHub: github.com/janedoe

Professional Summary

Full Stack Developer with over 5 years of experience building web applications using JavaScript, Node.js, and React. Passionate about creating efficient, scalable applications with a focus on user experience and performance optimization.

Skills

  • Programming Languages: JavaScript (ES6+), TypeScript, Python, Java
  • Frameworks & Libraries: React, Node.js, Express.js, Next.js
  • Databases: MongoDB, PostgreSQL, MySQL
  • Tools & Platforms: Git, Docker, AWS, Jenkins, CI/CD
  • Other: RESTful APIs, GraphQL, Agile/Scrum, TDD/BDD

Experience

Senior Full Stack Developer

ABC Tech Solutions, San Francisco, CA
June 2020 – Present
